positive: A vibrant and stylized portrait of a stylized celestial forest, featuring interlocking bioluminescent flora and fauna. The central element is a graceful, majestic lunar moth with iridescent wings, positioned against a deep indigo and midnight blue twilight sky. The composition is balanced and symmetrical, utilizing clean silhouettes and strong contrast. Accents of neon teal, electric violet, and pale gold emanate from the glowing vegetation, suggesting an ethereal, magical mood. High detail, flat vector style illustration with strong depth, suitable for screen printing on fabric. Crisp lines, clean edges, maximalist yet controlled, minimalist negative space.
negative: blur, noise, artifact, signature, text, watermark, logo, poor anatomy, extra limbs, copyright, masterpiece, low contrast, ugly, grain
